entries.definition:
l–q–f to catch up, to gulp up, to snatch up; to collapse, to
crumple. Of this root, only تَلْقَف talqaf occurs three times in the
Qur’an.

تَلْقَف talqaf [imperf. of v. I لَقِفَ laqifa, trans.] to gulp, to swallow
down (20:69) وَأَلْقِ مَا فِي يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوا throw down what is in
your right hand; it will swallow up what they have produced.
entries.definition_english:
l–q–f to catch up, to gulp up, to snatch up; to collapse, to
crumple. Of this root, only تَلْقَف talqaf occurs three times in the
Qur’an.

تَلْقَف talqaf [imperf. of v. I لَقِفَ laqifa, trans.] to gulp, to swallow
down (20:69) وَأَلْقِ مَا فِي يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوا throw down what is in
